2023-24 Saint Louis Billikens Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 13-20 (5-13, 13th in A-10 MBB)

Coach: Travis Ford

PS/G: 74.9 (135th of 362)

PA/G: 79.4 (340th of 362)

SRS: -1.57 (179th of 362)

SOS: 4.15 (95th of 362)

ORtg: 107.4 (158th of 362)

DRtg: 113.8 (354th of 362)
